javadoc_before:
/** * Create a new {@code FieldMatrix} using the input array as the underlying * data array. *

If an array is built specially in order to be embedded in a * {@code FieldMatrix} and not used directly, the {@code copyArray} may be * set to {@code false}. This will prevent the copying and improve * performance as no new array will be built and no data will be copied.

* * @param field Field to which the elements belong. * @param d Data for the new matrix. * @param copyArray Whether to copy or reference the input array. * @throws DimensionMismatchException if {@code d} is not rectangular. * @throws NoDataException if there are not at least one row and one column. * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.NullArgumentException * if {@code d} is {@code null}. * @see #Array2DRowFieldMatrix(FieldElement[][]) */
javadoc_after:
/** * Create a new {@code FieldMatrix} using the input array as the underlying * data array. *

If an array is built specially in order to be embedded in a * {@code FieldMatrix} and not used directly, the {@code copyArray} may be * set to {@code false}. This will prevent the copying and improve * performance as no new array will be built and no data will be copied.

* * @param field Field to which the elements belong. * @param d Data for the new matrix. * @param copyArray Whether to copy or reference the input array. * @throws DimensionMismatchException if {@code d} is not rectangular. * @throws NoDataException if there are not at least one row and one column. * @throws NullArgumentException if {@code d} is {@code null}. * @see #Array2DRowFieldMatrix(FieldElement[][]) */
